reviews.review_description: I was excited to see that there's a VR version of this game. I spent my money; albeit, not a lot, but still. I played a few times, and was enjoying myself. Now when I try to log on it won't go past the loading screen. So disappointing.

I as playing my very first hotel witch took around 45 min i felt it was very boring but I thought that it would get better in the 2nd one but when got to my new hotel when I clicked the button to go to the next hotel I was kicked out of the game! When I went back it left me on the unity screen and it was flashing it WONT LET ME PLAY and worst of all IT WONT LET ME REFUND this is unacceptable I want a refund and I know that it is a small price but I want my money back because I can’t play the game!! I was so excited to play but this ruined my evening come on. If I could give it minus stars I would!! Edit : I deleted the game and downloaded it again and it STILL WONT WORK!
Dream Hotel offers an enjoyable experience in hotel management, but adding more variety to certain features and improving the user interface could enhance the overall gameplay.

It's perfect for passing the time. I completed the first hotel and am now on the second one, and I didn't even realize how fast time passed. I recommend playing without high expectations and just enjoying the experience.
